wins_analysis: No wins today as the system produced zero recommendations. The AI model was unavailable, and the zone score fallback failed to generate any actionable setups meeting minimum thresholds.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the real failure is a complete absence of trade generation. The fallback mechanism (zone score only) appears too conservative or misconfigured to produce setups even in a mild trending-down regime with ADX=25 and low VIX=12.3.
regime_impact: Trending-down regime with ADX=25 should have favoured SHORT setups at supply zones. Low VIX=12.3 indicates stable conditions suitable for swing entries. The regime was tradeable but the system failed to capitalize — the fallback logic likely lacks SHORT-side supply zone scanning or has thresholds too high for non-AI mode.

improvements.action: Lower the fallback zone_score minimum from current threshold (likely 75+) to 65 when AI is unavailable, specifically for SHORT setups in trending_down regimes
improvements.reason: Zero setups generated despite ADX=25 downtrend and 50 stocks scanned — thresholds are clearly too restrictive for fallback mode

improvements.action: Add a dedicated supply-zone SHORT scanner to the fallback logic that triggers when regime=trending_down and ADX>=22, scanning for stocks trading near recent resistance with bearish candle patterns
improvements.reason: System appears biased toward BUY setups; a -0.3% Nifty day with strong ADX should have produced multiple SHORT candidates at supply zones

improvements.action: Implement an alert/escalation when AI model is unavailable so that a simplified rule-based engine (e.g., EMA crossover + volume spike + zone proximity) generates at least 3-5 candidates rather than zero
improvements.reason: Complete inactivity is worse than a small loss — zero trades means zero learning and zero returns. Today proved the fallback is effectively non-functional

improvements.action: Pre-screen tomorrow's candidates tonight: identify HDFCBANK, INFY, TCS, RELIANCE, ICICIBANK supply zones within 0.5% of current price for SHORT entries if downtrend continues
improvements.reason: With AI potentially unavailable again, manual pre-screening of high-liquidity names ensures at least some setups are ready at market open

improvements.action: Set entry timing to first 30-min ORB (Opening Range Breakout) confirmation for SHORT trades — place limit orders at supply zone only after 9:45 AM candle confirms lower high
improvements.reason: In mild downtrends (-0.3%), early morning fakeouts are common; waiting for ORB confirmation improves SHORT entry quality

tomorrow_focus: Ensure the system generates SHORT setups at supply zones for liquid Nifty 50 stocks if downtrend persists (watch if ADX holds above 22 and Nifty opens below today's close).

symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Check if price is near 1750-1770 supply zone — potential SHORT if rejected with volume
symbol_notes.INFY.NS: IT sector weak in downtrend; scan for supply zone near recent swing high for SHORT entry
symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Monitor 2900-2920 zone — if acting as resistance tomorrow, good SHORT candidate aligned with regime
symbol_notes.TCS.NS: Sector weakness in IT; identify nearest supply zone for fallback SHORT setup
